case_title: IN RE: STEVEN CHAFFIN et al

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FILED BY PETITIONER CHAFFIN, STEVEN DUAN, PENNY

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS STEVEN CHAFFIN AND PENNY DUAN'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DISMISSED AS MOOT. IT APPEARS THAT THE PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO ARBITRATE AND THAT THE ARBITRATION IS UNDERWAY. REQUESTS FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS ARE DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS STEVEN CHAFFIN and PENNY DUAN's Petition To Compel Arbitration is dismissed as moot. It appears that the parties have agreed to arbitrate and that the arbitration is underway. Requests for attorneys fees and costs are denied without prejudice. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.
